name: celq
description: Common Expression Language (CEL) CLI tool. Evaluate CEL expressions against JSON, JSON5, YAML, TOML, and XML input. Filter, transform, and validate structured data with a familiar expression syntax.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install celq: cargo install celq or brew install celq

commands.description: Evaluate CEL expression against structured data (JSON, YAML, TOML, XML)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install celq: cargo install celq or brew install celq

args.name: -n
args.description: No input mode (do not read from STDIN, evaluate expression only)

args.name: --arg
args.description: Pass an argument to the expression (e.g. --arg='fruit:string=apple')

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install celq: cargo install celq or brew install celq
